Cutting-Edge Ad Tech Solutions

Powering Digital Advertising
Innovating the Future

Programmatic platform, display & video, HTML5 games, PPK SDK—seamless monetization across web, mobile & CTV.

Core Business

Three core technology platforms, building a complete programmatic advertising ecosystem.

  • • Millisecond-level response
  • • Intelligent algorithm optimization
  • • Data analytics and reporting

Maximize the value of your advertising across every format, on any screen

DisplayNativeVideoRewardPhoneLaptopDesktopCTVWebAppMini program

Your audience, data, and content are your greatest assets—and you should retain full control over how they're managed. If your focus is on maximizing yield and streamlining operational efficiency, you're in the right place.

  • 1Maximize eCPM via real-time bidding
  • 2Access massive demand sources to boost fill rates
  • 3Data-driven targeting improves relevance and engagement
  • 4Real-time analytics, floor pricing & brand safety controls
  • 5Auto-scale with traffic; diversified demand stabilizes revenue
  • 6Unified management for web, app & mini-program traffic

2Real-Time Auction

5Reporting & Optimization

Our RTB Partners

Maximize your reach. Optimize every channel.

  • • Premium inventory & partnerships with large media owners
  • • Scalable platform & auction efficiency
  • • Transparency across the supply chain

Our Solutions

Built for advertisers and publishers across the programmatic ecosystem.

RTB Solution

Real-time bidding monetization for publishers. Higher fill rate, eCPM, and transparency.

Advertiser Solution

All formats, all channels. Premium inventory, addressability, and full-service support.

HTML5 Ads Solution

High-engagement interactive HTML5 campaigns and ad exchange for advertisers.

SDK Monetization

Lightweight SDK for publishers. Fast integration, multiple ad formats, stable performance.

RTB Solution for Publishers

Help publishers improve fill rate, eCPM, revenue stability, and transparency.

  • Real-time bidding monetization
  • Access to global demand
  • Better yield management
  • Brand safety & pricing controls
  • Unified traffic management across web/app/mini program
  • Real-time reporting

All formats, all channels.

Through a single, unified platform, we deliver direct access to premium display, video, streaming TV, mobile, and native ad inventory from reputable media owners.

Addressability

Connect with the right audiences at the right time. Our addressability solutions deliver the flexibility and control to scale audience-focused campaigns efficiently.

Services and support

Our dedicated team of experts is here to drive your success. Combining strategic consulting and ongoing support, we work alongside you to scale effectively, boost performance, and deliver strong ROI.

Transact on your terms

Transact on your own terms with tailored buying solutions for every campaign. From direct deals and curated marketplaces to the open exchange, we offer streamlined access to inventory and flexible purchasing capabilities.

Data and analytics

Turn insights into action with comprehensive analytics and tailored reporting to optimize campaign performance. Achieve full visibility into ad spend with transparent impression-level reporting via our Client Audit Logs, delivering a verified record for every transaction.

ADX · High-Engagement HTML5 Advertising

A performance-focused ad exchange built for advertisers to run interactive HTML5 campaigns.

Leverage the most advanced ad delivery technology to maximize revenue.

Unlock multiple formats and delivery methods to maximize your revenue with minimal changes to your existing systems.

  • Support for Rich Media Ad Formats
  • Header Bidding
  • Support for Special Implementations
  • Smart SDK

Cross-platform

Based on web technology, H5 ads display smoothly on mobile, PC, tablet, APP, and mini-programs. One production enables full-network placement.

Better Interaction

Supports sliding, clicking, animation, forms, games. It turns passive ads into active interaction, significantly improving CTR and dwell time.

Fast Update

No download or re-review required. Supports real-time edits of copy, assets, and rules, quickly responding to trends and data.

Data Visible

Accurately tracks exposure, clicks, conversions, dwell time, shares. Supports real-time monitoring and attribution.

Programmatic Ready

Fully compatible with ADX, RTB, DSP, and programmatic ecosystems. Supports precise targeting, batch placement, and smart bidding.

SDK Monetization · Built for Publishers

A lightweight monetization SDK designed to help publishers turn traffic into sustainable revenue.

Lightweight Size, Fast Integration

Minimal SDK size drastically reduces integration and review time for quick monetization launch.

Stable Compatibility, Wide Adaptation

Compatible with multiple OS versions and devices, reducing crashes and compatibility issues.

Low Resource, No Performance Worries

Minimal CPU, memory, and battery consumption ensures no impact on app fluidity and user experience.

Flexible Expansion, Efficient Monetization

Supports one-click access to multiple ad sources and header bidding, boosting revenue without extra development.

4 Easy Steps to Monetize Your Products

1. Integrate the SDK2. Configure Placements3. Handle Delivery4. Monitor Performance
